title: What Anniversary Is Crystal? (Traditional Anniversary Meanings)
eastern_note: Traditional & modern anniversary lists both mark year 15 as crystal; add Eastern view of clear quartz (光/圆满) and rose quartz (姻缘) as enduring-love stones.
